category_sources: source_facts.description describes choose-rust as a human-friendly fast alternative to cut and sometimes awk.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official theryangeary/choose repository; source_facts.executables lists the binary as choose.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an upstream repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies cut/awk-style text processing; source_facts.executables lists the CLI binary choose.
